name: Q1501391
abstract: Eugene "Gene" Gammage (born January 30, 1931) is an American jazz drummer.

about_quotes.speaker: Jimmy Cobb
about_quotes.evidence: He’s my friend. ... We were good friends for a minute. ... he was a good friend, Gene Gammage.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jimmy Cobb — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Pat LaBarbera
about_quotes.evidence: Gene was looking for a gig. So he came up. ... I got to hang out with him and he became a real close friend all through the years.
